Off Calendar Jan-08-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Judgment Creditor's Motion For Assignment Of Rights is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Off Calendar Dec-29-2006 Continued To Jan-08-07 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 612

MOTION For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, Turnover Order
Off Calendar Apr-17-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: JUDGMENT CREDITOR PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY'S MOTION For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, Turnover Order IS OFF CALENDAR TO BE RENOTICED IN DISCOVERY. (301/JLW/ju) Judge: James L. Warren, Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Nov-30-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance - tentative ruling adopted:

Plaintiff SBC/Pacific Bell Directory's Motion For Order Compelling Answers To Written Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Judgment Debtor's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Judgment Debtor is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $586.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Nov-02-2005 Continued To Nov-30-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 612
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel answers to interrogatories is continued to Nov-30-2005 at 9:00 AM in Department 612 per request of the moving party. COMMISSIONER: EVERETT A. HEWLETT.
